title: Frogcrafting's Hardcore Modpack Resources
description: A resource pack used for the Frogcrafting Hardcore Modpack.
body:
![Separator Bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76fd838349e2eefaa42871f42acce22810e9a64e.png)

## Frogcrafting's Hardcore Modpack Resources  
This is a simple resource pack that contains assets used in [Frogcrafting's Hardcore Modpack](https://modrinth.com/project/51e0kYxF).  
Currently, all related to the main menu, including a static background panorama, title & edition banner, and custom splash text.  

You're likely here by accident, but if you think those gallery images look pretty, check out [Frogcrafting's Hardcore Modpack](https://modrinth.com/project/51e0kYxF).
